body:
I have updated the default maximum Prandtl number in ClimaParams and made a release (0.10.30). This way we can avoid overwriting this number in all of our toml files.

I have a corresponding PR that updated ClimaCoupler to the new ClimaParams: https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/pull/1352
title: Limit by Pr_max = 10 (new default in ClimaParams v0.10.30)
